shots.prompt: Close-up of a young person's hands holding a smartphone, scrolling through a clean modern investment app interface with green charts and numbers, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, clean minimalist style
shots.motion: slow zoom in on phone screen
shots.purpose: 視聴者の注目を引く — スマホ投資の身近さを演出

shots.prompt: Abstract motion graphics of coins and yen symbols floating upward against a dark gradient background, clean infographic style, glowing green accent colors, modern typography aesthetic
shots.purpose: 「損してる可能性」のインパクトを視覚化

shots.prompt: Clean data visualization showing a comparison: two bar charts side by side, one labeled with a tax symbol losing 20%, the other full bar glowing green, modern flat design, dark background with white and green accents
shots.motion: bars animate from bottom to top, smooth easing
shots.purpose: 課税 vs 非課税の差を視覚的に比較
shots.overlay_text: 通常の投資 → 利益の約20%が税金

shots.prompt: Animated infographic showing 100,000 yen splitting into two portions — 80,000 remaining and 20,000 fading away as tax, then transitioning to 100,000 fully intact with a green glow, clean modern design, dark background
shots.motion: smooth transition from split to whole amount
shots.purpose: 10万円の具体例で非課税メリットを実感させる

shots.prompt: Clean split-screen infographic diagram: left side shows a blue box labeled with accumulation icon and 120 number, right side shows a green box labeled with growth icon and 240 number, modern flat design with rounded corners, dark gradient background, subtle grid lines
shots.motion: boxes slide in from left and right, then a connecting line appears between them
shots.purpose: つみたて投資枠と成長投資枠の2つの枠を図解

shots.prompt: Animated circular progress chart filling up to show 360 out of 1800, clean modern data visualization, green gradient fill, white numbers on dark background, minimal design with subtle glow effects
shots.motion: circular fill animation, smooth counter increment
shots.purpose: 年間360万円と生涯1,800万円の関係を視覚化
shots.overlay_text: 年間360万円 / 生涯1,800万円

shots.prompt: Overhead shot of hands typing on a smartphone, filling out a clean registration form on screen, minimalist desk setup with a card and coffee cup nearby, warm soft lighting, clean modern aesthetic
shots.motion: slow dolly down from slightly above
shots.purpose: ステップ1: 口座開設の具体的なイメージ
shots.overlay_text: Step 1 — ネット証券で口座開設

shots.prompt: Close-up of a smartphone screen showing a clean investment app interface with a monthly amount selector slider, numbers changing smoothly, modern UI design with green accent buttons, soft bokeh background
shots.motion: gentle zoom in on the amount slider
shots.purpose: ステップ2: つみたて設定の操作感を演出
shots.overlay_text: Step 2 — つみたて投資枠で積立設定

shots.prompt: Animated calendar pages flipping forward month by month, each page showing a small green checkmark and growing bar chart in the corner, clean paper texture, warm lighting, smooth page-turn animation
shots.motion: pages flip from right to left, steady rhythm
shots.purpose: ステップ3: 「放置でOK」の時間経過を表現

shots.prompt: Abstract stock market line chart on dark background, line moving up and down with realistic market volatility, green and red segments, clean minimalist data visualization style, subtle grid overlay
shots.motion: chart draws from left to right, line animates in real-time
shots.purpose: 株価の上下動を見せてリスクの存在を正直に提示

shots.prompt: Infographic showing three interconnected circles labeled with clock icon, globe icon, and stack icon, representing long-term, diversification, and accumulation, clean modern design with soft gradients, dark background
shots.motion: circles appear one by one with subtle bounce
shots.purpose: 長期・分散・積立の3要素を図解で強調
shots.overlay_text: 長期 × 分散 × 積立 = リスク軽減の基本

shots.prompt: Same smartphone from opening shot now showing a completed investment setup screen with a green success checkmark, warm natural lighting, clean composition matching shot ge_001
shots.motion: slow zoom out revealing the full phone and hands
shots.purpose: 冒頭のスマホ画面に戻り、ストーリーを完結させる
shots.overlay_text: 月100円 × 非課税 × いつでも引き出せる

shots.prompt: Clean end screen template with subscribe button animation, modern gradient background transitioning from dark blue to green, minimal design with smooth motion
shots.motion: subscribe button pulses gently, background gradient shifts
shots.purpose: チャンネル登録CTAの視覚的アクセント
shots.overlay_text: チャンネル登録で次回も見逃さない

production_notes: 全体トーン: クリーンなインフォグラフィックスタイル。人物の顔は映さない方針。暗い背景に緑のアクセントカラーで統一感を出す。TEXT ON SCREENはポスプロでオーバーレイ追加（Runway生成には含めない）。ge_001とge_012は同じスマホ・同じ構図でブックエンド構造を意識。金融データの図解ショット（ge_003〜ge_006）はDaVinci Resolveでのモーショングラフィックス追加も検討。
